sizing_rule.note: Fixed unit exposure (1 contract) per trade with geometric compounding via reinvestment of all profits into subsequent position sizing. Position size grows with cumulative profits, implementing anti-martingale logic. Author silent on optimal_f, kelly_fraction, and max_drawdown_tolerance.

source_rule_text: Position size is independent of margin requirements; profits and losses are determined by exposure per unit (1 contract), not by margin amount, enabling geometric compounding through reinvestment of all profits.
